safe_claim: Phase 1 was applied to 31 retained evidence items and all 11 action-frozen pawn episodes. The bounded contact-model campaign did not repair or promote the simulator, but it localized the C2 drop and added a non-promoting post-first-lift task diagnostic.

findings: The gripper remains closed; bilateral contact is lost at source frame 323, 78 frames before intended release.
The load-bearing pair is moving-rubber to fixed-rigid, not rubber-to-rubber.
Contact migrates from the upper-collar/head transition onto the head sphere while opposing load collapses.
Corrected fixed-rubber placements regress the sentinel consequence vector, so the physical rubber profile remains unidentified.

resolved_inconsistencies.finding: C2, D2, and F2 enter the destination after first lift; D2 and F2 do so below the instantaneous 40 mm gate while bilateral contact remains.
The baseline fixed sleeve never enters the C2 contact witness, and corrected placements regress consequence metrics.
The selected contact-dimensionality candidate loses contact nine source frames earlier and fails the EE guard.
